name: United Kingdom National Security Architecture — Senior Leadership KPV Assessment
description: KPV assessment of UK national security senior leadership. All roles public record. Sources: Cabinet Office, ISC reports, CPNI, public parliamentary records, King's College War Studies research.

roles.title: National Security Adviser (Cabinet Office)
roles.notes: UK equivalent of U.S. NSA. Five Eyes NSA relationships; NATO/EU intelligence coordination. Source: Cabinet Office public org; ISC annual reports.

roles.title: Director, GCHQ
roles.notes: SIGINT partnership lead with NSA/Five Eyes. NSI Act proximity concerns near GCHQ Cheltenham documented in parliamentary debate. Source: GCHQ public org; Hansard NSI Bill debates 2020-21.

roles.title: Chief, Secret Intelligence Service (MI6)
roles.notes: HUMINT network and allied liaison relationships maximally tacit. 'C' designation is publicly known; specific incumbent announced publicly. Source: SIS public statements; ISC reports.

roles.title: Director General, Security Service (MI5)
roles.notes: Domestic CI and CT programme leadership. CPNI key personnel security architecture. Source: MI5 public org; ISC annual reports.

roles.title: Chief of Defence Intelligence
roles.notes: UK DI equivalent of DIA director. NATO intelligence committee relationships. Source: MOD public org; parliamentary defence committee reports.

roles.title: Director, National Cyber Security Centre
roles.notes: GCHQ NCSC; Five Eyes cyber partnership coordination. Source: NCSC public org.

roles.title: Chair, Joint Intelligence Committee
roles.notes: All-source intelligence assessment coordination across UK IC. Source: Cabinet Office JIC public charter.

roles.title: Director, Centre for the Protection of National Infrastructure
roles.notes: Key Personnel Security architecture owner — the UK's most developed allied KPV protection programme. Source: CPNI public charter; CPNI 'Sensitive Sites and Personnel Security' 2023.

roles.title: Head of Investment Security Unit (BEIS/DBT)
roles.notes: NSI Act 2021 screening authority; analogous to CFIUS. Agricultural land proximity call-in power. Source: NSI Act 2021; BEIS/DBT public guidance.

roles.title: MI5 Director General Counterintelligence
roles.notes: Source protection and CI network relationships. Source: ISC China report 2023.
